title: Choose one explicit reset strategy
description: Decide synchronous vs asynchronous reset deliberately and apply it consistently to every state element in the clock domain.
body: Use when adding registers or bringing up a new module. Do not leave some flops reset and others relying on power-up state, and do not mix sync and async reset arbitrarily in one domain. Actions: pick sync or async reset per the target (FPGA often sync, ASIC often async-assert/sync-deassert), apply it to all stateful elements, and verify reset release timing. Validation signals include a reset-sequence test asserting known state after reset and no X propagation past deassert. Risk boundary: relying on initial-block values for reset works in sim but not on ASIC; flag it.
